title: My Grandmother's House by Kamala Das - Summary In Hindi
description:
Few poems carry grief the way Kamala Das's "My Grandmother's House" does — it opens with a house that "went silent" after her grandmother's death, and that silence becomes the poem's wound, one that never quite heals. A confessional masterpiece studied in BA English Honours, DU SOL, and CBSE senior classes, this poem explores themes of loss and belonging through imagery so raw it feels less like literature and more like memory bleeding onto paper. If you've ever searched for "My Grandmother's House by Kamala Das summary and explanation in Hindi," this is exactly where that ache gets unpacked, line by line.
